query: SELECT t.id, t.name, t.type, t.required, o.name as option_name, o.price, o.is_default, o.sort_order FROM modifier_templates t JOIN modifier_template_options o ON o.template_id = t.id WHERE t.name = 'Chinese Sides' ORDER BY o.sort_order;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user TRWPPSjpVsMrzts.root --database HH4sKdeJGjocgFW8dJxnCN --execute SELECT t.id, t.name, t.type, t.required, o.name as option_name, o.price, o.is_default, o.sort_order FROM modifier_templates t JOIN modifier_template_options o ON o.template_id = t.id WHERE t.name = 'Chinese Sides' ORDER BY o.sort_order;
